headline: Ethereum Staking Yields $46M for Bitmine in Q2

headline: Bitcoin Softfork Falters, 80% Junk Data Remains

article.title: The Bitcoin Softfork That Tried to Police “Junk Data” — And Why It’s Already Failing
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

The Bitcoin Softfork That Tried to Police “Junk Data” — And Why It’s Already Failing
Bitcoin’s real power is that anyone willing to pay fees can write to the ledger. BIP-110’s backers want to change that for data-heavy transactions. The backlash reveals what’s truly at stake.

headline: $1B Crypto Allocation Surge Hits Asset Managers

article.title: Bitcoin vs Gold as a Reserve Asset
article.summary: A reserve asset is something an institution or government holds to preserve value, provide liquidity, and act as a store of wealth outside its day-to-day operating currency.
